visual_findings: The application Drawing Review screenshot was captured successfully and was used as the acceptance evidence.
The previous dense slanted AutoDimension callout stack is no longer visible after disabling reference-intent AutoDimension.
The generated drawing is still visually unacceptable because most reference-style DisplayDim dimensions are missing from the front, top, and right views.
The reference drawing has concise readable dimensions and a compact right-side callout group; the generated drawing now lacks the required dimensions instead of matching that style.
API/status fields remain supporting evidence only and do not override this FAIL visual judgement.
cases.required_next_action: Keep AutoDimension disabled for 006 reference-intent acceptance, then implement reliable explicit SolidWorks DisplayDim creation or model-dimension seeding for the copied input_work part until the application Drawing Review UI screenshot visually matches the same-name reference.

acceptance_rule: A drawing is not accepted until the application Drawing Review UI screenshot is visually judged PASS against the same-name reference drawing.
